details: Strategy D (503 + h2_end_stream=1) is blocking page loads, not just API calls. First attempt: page loaded from cache, 'test' message sent successfully. After reload: ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR followed by redirect to gemini.google.com/unavailable ('Gemini를 일시적으로 사용할 수 없습니다'). Korean SSN prompt could not be submitted - input field accepted text but Enter/click did not trigger form submission (React state mismatch from clipboard paste). The 503 response is being interpreted by Google's infrastructure as a service outage, blocking the entire page rather than just the sensitive API call. This is a regression from the page-load blocking removal.
notes: 503 Strategy D causes full page block for Gemini. Need to either: (1) exempt page load URLs from APF, or (2) only apply 503 to API POST endpoints, not all gemini.google.com requests.
